name: 讀心術懸念鉤
description: 家人能聽到女主內心獨白這一設定，讓觀眾好奇：女主腦中的未來記憶會如何改變家人的態度？這個機制讓每一次內心獨白都成為推動劇情的關鍵節點，持續製造信息差帶來的爽感。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Could that voice be Xixi's innermost thoughts? / They were truly completely under Xie Qingwan's control. / Xie Qingwan was clearly unharmed. / She, however, made her whole family nervously revolve around her.
